evals.prompt: Convert this Nature-style PDF into a full-paper structured Markdown reader: do not just summarize the abstract or first few pages. Each body paragraph should be preserved cleanly, figures/tables should be cropped and inserted near their first substantive citation, original captions should be retained, and every block must link back to its source location.
evals.expected_output: A full-paper Markdown reader with paragraph-level structured blocks, stable source anchors, cropped figure/table assets, figure cards near first substantive mentions, clear captions, and grounded follow-up pointers.

evals.prompt: I only have the DOI for a conference paper. Please process it into a readable full-text Markdown reader; if full text cannot be retrieved, explicitly mark the gap and tell me what content can only be confirmed from the abstract or metadata. Body blocks must be preserved in structured format without collapsing into an abstract page.
evals.expected_output: A full-document or draft-mode Markdown reader that clearly separates confirmed content from missing content, keeps block/page navigation, and preserves structured alignment for every available block.

evals.prompt: This is a scanned paper. Please perform OCR and generate a full-document Markdown reader, preserving the relationship between captions and main text; label low confidence wherever recognition is unstable. Figures and tables need to be cropped to assets and placed at corresponding text locations.
evals.expected_output: An OCR-aware full-document Markdown reader with structured text blocks, uncertainty labels, cropped figure/table assets, nearby captions, page navigation, and source-linked follow-up support.
